name: Line of Separation
overview: After the fall of the Third Reich, the small town of Tannbach is cruelly divided between East and West regimes and the town’s inhabitants suffer the consequences. A gripping historical drama exploring the devastating effects decades of conflict had on communities from the end of the Second War War to the fall of the Berlin Wall.

trailers.title: Tannbach - Line Of Separation - Meilleur Programme Long de Fiction
